description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a sheep, featuring a faceted, polygonal body with a large, rounded white wool coat that covers most of its form. The head is dark brown and angular, with a blunt snout and no visible horns. The legs are slender, straight, and dark, supporting the body in a standing posture. The ears are small and slightly pointed, extending outward from the sides of the head. The tail is short and blocky, hanging down at the rear of the body. The overall appearance is simplified and geometric, with a matte finish and no intricate surface details.
description: A low-poly sheep with a white, faceted wool coat, dark head and legs, and a simple, geometric form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, faceted wool coat and two straight, dark legs beneath, with the head mostly obscured.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the full profile of the sheep, including the angular head, small pointed ear, and short tail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the rounded back and wool coat, with the head and snout visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head, ear, and tail, with the legs in a standing position.
attribute_wool_pattern: The wool appears uniform and blocky, with a faceted, polygonal texture rather than a realistic curly or wavy pattern. There are no distinct markings or color variations; the wool is a consistent white throughout.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are small, slightly pointed, and extend outward from the sides of the head. They are not drooping or upright, but rather stick out at a slight angle.
attribute_tail_position: The tail is short, blocky, and hangs down at the rear of the body. It is straight and not curled or tucked, with limited visibility from the side views.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are straight and positioned to support the body in a standing posture. All four legs are evenly spaced and appear to be bearing weight, indicating a stationary stance.
